Package org.key_project.slicing.graph

package org.key_project.slicing.graph
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    org.key_project.slicing
     
    org.key_project.slicing.analysis
     
    org.key_project.slicing.ui
     
    org.key_project.slicing.util
     
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    AddedRule
    Graph node that represents a rule added by some rule application.
    AnnotatedEdge
    An edge of the dependency graph.
    AnnotatedShortenedEdge
    An annotated edge representing a chain of real proof nodes.
    ClosedGoal
    Graph node that represents a closed goal.
    DependencyGraph
    The dependency graph tracks the flow of rule applications in the proof tree.
    DotExporter
    Exports a DependencyGraph in DOT format.
    EquivalenceDirectedGraph
    A directed graph, extended to store equivalence groups of vertices.
    GraphNode
    A graph node used in the DependencyGraph.
    PseudoInput
    Graph node used if a rule application did not use any input formulas.
    PseudoOutput
    Graph node used if a rule application did not produce any outputs.
    TrackedFormula
    A sequent formula tracked by the dependency graph.
